description:
In Casebox (already open in Firefox at http://localhost/c/default), log in as admin (Username: root, Password: Admin1234!) and add a new task inside the 'Digital Surveillance Monitoring Initiative' folder under 'Active Investigations'.

Create a task with exactly the following details:
- Title: 'Prepare legal brief on Pegasus spyware violations for ECHR submission'
- The task should be created as a child item within the 'Digital Surveillance Monitoring Initiative' folder

Steps:
1. Log in with the admin credentials if not already logged in
2. Navigate to Active Investigations > Digital Surveillance Monitoring Initiative in the tree
3. Create a new task (right-click or use the toolbar)
4. Enter the task title exactly as specified above
5. Save the task

The new task should appear in the tree under the Digital Surveillance Monitoring Initiative folder.

metadata.task_title: Prepare legal brief on Pegasus spyware violations for ECHR submission
